overview: Tutor Finder is a mobile-first marketplace app for students in India to find and connect with nearby offline tutors. Features two learning modes (Learn at Home / Go to Tutor), Tinder-style swipe discovery, contact unlock, booking, and review — all in a clean, trust-focused UI.
features: Phone OTP login with Indian number format
Mode selection: Learn at Home vs Go to Tutor
Requirements form with class, subjects, budget slider, and location
Tutor listing with ratings, distance, price, and verification badges
Tinder-style swipe interface for tutor discovery
Contact unlock payment screen (₹99 per unlock)
Demo class booking with calendar and time slot picker
Bottom tab navigation (Home, Explore, Bookings, Profile)
Trust signals: verified badges, star ratings, review counts
